emails.body: RE: Conference Call with PG&E to Discuss the Gas Portion of Its Proposed Plan of Reorganization that It Will File w/FERC Toward End of November Thanks for getting in touch. Yes, we can schedule. Do you know who all would participate? Best, Jeff

emails.body: RE: Conference Call with PG&E to Discuss the Gas Portion of Its Proposed Plan of Reorganization that It Will File w/FERC Toward End of November We are scheduled to meet with PG&E to discuss their plan of reorganization for gas on Jan. 8th at 10 AM CST. If you have any questions, please let me know. Best, Jeff

emails.body: RE: Conference Call with PG&E to Discuss the Gas Portion of Its Proposed Plan of Reorganization that It Will File w/FERC Toward End of November Good morning! Are we still on tomorrow? What are the calling instructions? Thanks. To: Lokay, Michelle; Tycholiz, Barry; Tholt, Jane M.; Calger, Christopher F.; Belden, Tim; Harris, Steven; Miller, Stephanie; Steffes, James D.
